subject: Klink, two interlocked gear-like creatures in a mechanical setting
description: Two round, grey gear-like creatures with faces are interlocked together, teeth meshed. Each gear-face has small eyes and a simple expression. Around them, the background is filled with other gear shapes, metal machinery parts, and a dark industrial or mechanical environment. The palette is steel greys, dark backgrounds, and occasional metallic glints. The pairing of the two identical gears is the central visual motif.
foreground: two round grey gear-shaped creatures with faces, interlocked teeth
background: dark mechanical environment filled with gear shapes and machinery
